galleria-moon.title: Galleria Moon
galleria-moon.blurb: A pied-à-terre composed in chalk, walnut, and brushed brass — daylight is treated as the principal material.

madinaty.title: Madinaty
madinaty.blurb: Two units, one architectural family. Restraint is held throughout while material temperature shifts between the public and private rooms.

villa-hamdy.title: PalmHills
villa-hamdy.blurb: A family villa held in two materials and one decision — to let every room face the same garden.

palmhills-golf-extension.title: Palm Hills · Golf Extension
palmhills-golf-extension.blurb: An extension that performs the original architecture rather than answer it — the new volumes recede so the garden takes the room.

palmhills-1702.title: The Village
palmhills-1702.blurb: A modern Mediterranean reading of the standard plan — long thresholds, low partitions, the garden allowed to read into the interior.

rehab-city-01.title: Rehab City · 01
rehab-city-01.blurb: A compact reception reorganised around a single material gesture in micro-cement and oak.

riyadh-villa.title: Riyadh Villa
riyadh-villa.blurb: A house held together by stone and a single, slow palette of bone, ash, and gold — light is shaped before it is filtered.

seashell-north-coast.title: Seashell · North Coast
seashell-north-coast.blurb: Salt, plaster, and travertine. The plan is opened to the sea and then quieted with shaded interior rooms.

sodic.title: Sodic
sodic.blurb: A townhouse drawn against the standard finish — micro-cement, brass, and a single oak stair as the spine.

uptown-cairo.title: Uptown Cairo
uptown-cairo.blurb: Hill-top views answered with a low, dark-toned palette — the room recedes so the city stays the subject.

upvill.title: Upvill
upvill.blurb: The complete arc — reception, bedrooms, kitchen, bathrooms, balconies — drawn as one continuous architectural gesture.
